welcome.heading: Welcome to Fleet Tracking Platform
welcome.subtitle: A modern microfrontend architecture for fleet management
welcome.description: Navigate through the menu to access fleet tracking modules that work seamlessly together.

demo.title: Feature Demo
demo.subtitle: This page demonstrates theme usage, language switching, and RTL layout support.

themeSection.title: Theme Showcase
themeSection.description: All components use the centralized Material UI theme with fleet-tracking branded colors.

i18nSection.title: Internationalization (i18n)
i18nSection.description: Switch the language using the toolbar dropdown. All text on this page is translated dynamically at runtime.

rtlSection.title: RTL Layout Support
rtlSection.description: Toggle the direction using the toolbar button. All components, padding, margins, and icons flip automatically.

map.googleNotAvailable: Google Maps is not available. Add an API key to enable Google Maps.

settings.title: Google Maps API Key
settings.description: Enter your Google Maps Platform API key to enable Google Maps layers.
settings.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Google Maps API key
settings.saveSuccess: API key validated and saved successfully.
settings.saveError: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
